notes: 3.10.19 TAI CAU TRUC NAV (sau flag FLAG_NAV_V2=false, an toan). Khi bat: (A) Nhom Nhan su bo 'Nhan vien' + them 4 muc Luong (Tham so/Engine/Ky luong/Duyet — onclick modal, giu quyen, song song Admin Menu). (B) Nhom Bao cao them Ngan sach(Ke hoach/Don gia)+Quy luong. (C) Bo nhom Ngan sach. (D) Admin Menu them 'Quan ly nguoi dung'(staff, IT). (E) Thu vien = tab le rieng, MOI NV xem duoc. Flag tat = nav cu. Rollback = dat false.
